contract_claim: If `coverage.total` exists but `coverage.total.lines` is absent (malformed coverage JSON), accessing `.lines.pct` will throw a TypeError, bypassed silently by the outer catch which then calls `process.exit(1)` with only the generic error message.
observed_behavior: If `coverage.total` exists but `coverage.total.lines` is absent (malformed coverage JSON), accessing `.lines.pct` will throw a TypeError, bypassed silently by the outer catch which then calls `process.exit(1)` with only the generic error message.
